name: Pot Roast Dinner
recipeIngredient: 6 Carrots, quartered and cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the roast.
2. If necessary, cut the roast to fit inside the crock pot.
3. In a skillet, brown the roast on all sides in hot oil.
4. In a bowl, combine tomato juice, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, sugar, salt, basil, thyme, pepper, and garlic.
5. Place carrots and onions in the 6-quart crockpot.
6. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
7. Place the roast on top of the vegetables.
8. Pour the tomato mixture over the roast.
9. Cover; cook on low-heat setting for 10-12 hours or high-heat setting for 5-6 hours.
10. Transfer meat and vegetables to a platter.
11. Skim fat from the gravy.
12. Serve gravy with mashed potatoes.
